privileged_info_summary: The task involves GeoServer 2.25.2 and PostGIS 15-3.3 deployed via Docker. The environment uses real, publicly available Natural Earth 1:110m geospatial datasets: ne_110m_populated_places (approximately 1,600+ point features of world cities) and ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines (global river/lake centerline features). These datasets are downloaded from naciscdn.org/naturalearth CDN and imported into PostGIS database 'gis' (user: geoserver) via ogr2ogr. The task requires creating two workspaces (infrastructure, environment) with corresponding PostGIS datastores, publishing 2 layers (settlements from ne_populated_places, waterways from ne_rivers), creating 2 SLD styles (settlement_marker with circle/orange, waterway_line with blue line), and assembling a global layer group (regional_portal). GeoServer admin credentials: admin/Admin123!
